extraction.one_line_summary: CALMEJANE Lilian won from the breakaway after attacking solo on the final climb, holding off HESJEDAL despite severe cramping in final 4km.
tactical_patterns: ROCHE Nicolas bridged from chase group to leaders then attacked, fragmenting break before CALMEJANE's winning move.
Team Sky placed both HENAO and KWIATKOWSKI in break despite needing to control GC threats, showing confused tactical priorities.
THOMAS Geraint delivered bottles while doing finale workload for Sky, revealing team's stretched resources on hard stages.

rider_signals.CALMEJANE Lilian: positive: overcame severe cramping at 4km to go without panicking, showing exceptional mental control under first Tour stage win pressure
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: positive: strong enough to bridge between groups and shatter the break's cohesion on final climb
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: finished with main GC group 50 seconds down, collecting KOM points on category 1 Planée
rider_signals.BROWN Nathan: positive: unexpectedly finished with main GC group, suggesting climbing form better than anticipated
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: descended dangerously fast causing THOMAS and FROOME to crash off road, nearly destroying Sky's race
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: crashed off-road retrieving bottles but immediately resumed tempo work, exemplifying Sky's depth on difficult stages
